name: Displacement Warp (Noise)
description: Reproducible twin of create_displacement_warp in noise mode: a Displace TOP warps a source's UVs by an animated monochrome noiseTOP modulator, so the image ripples and flows. A synthetic horizontal rampTOP stands in as the source so it previews offline; swap it for a selectTOP to warp real footage. The modulator drifts via absTime expressions on its tx/ty so the warp animates offline. The second_top and audio modulator modes swap the noise for a select/audiospectrum source. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; live-cook-validated on TD 099 build 2025.32820.

nodes.name: source
nodes.comment: Synthetic source — swap for a selectTOP / moviefileinTOP to warp real content.

nodes.name: modulator
nodes.comment: Monochrome displacement driver; tx/ty drift via absTime so the warp flows offline.

nodes.name: displace
nodes.comment: Warps the source's UVs (input 0) by the modulator (input 1). uvweight = UV warp amount.

parameters.name: modulator_drift_x
parameters.description: Drifts the noise modulator horizontally so the warp animates offline.

preview_description: A horizontal color ramp rippling and flowing as an animated noise field pushes its pixels around — a smooth UV displacement warp with a single Amount knob.
